tokens: Okay, I'm around to get the 500 (from under the CDR seat).

tokens: They have a very shocked appearance.

tokens: And that's why your dark streaks show up on your photographs.

tokens: I see some secondaries in the inner flank.

tokens: (Turning to face the TV) There it comes.

tokens: (Lost under Tony) going back down in the flat part.

tokens: (Talking to the SCB) You dog, you!

tokens: And as we leave Cinco Crater, we bid a fond farewell.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Okay; and, John, we'll need a frame count from you.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: My frame count is 76, magazine Charlie.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: John, could you give me (16-mm) magazine Romeo?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I think on this next one we ought to stop away from any boulders down at 5, so we can get some
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Is that where you got Romeo from, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: We could move 40 feet...(correcting himself) 50 meters downslope, and I think we'd have Descartes, but we'll look.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That 50 meters downslope you described, is that a blocky rim crater, or why do you think that is Descartes?
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Because there's no blocks around it at all.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It's just an old subdued crater.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: It's got a few blocks around it.
(Pause) Tony, I can see that one downslope that you want us to stop at for Station 5.
It won't be any trouble getting there, but if you give us a vector, that'll be certain.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: The vector will be 352 (should be 354) heading and seven tenths (kilometer drive)
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Does that look like the best bet to you?
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: That seems to be about it...(Stops to listen)
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: What they're looking for is a primary impact crater in Descartes.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: What we're looking for is a primary impact at blocky rim crater.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Suppose we give you a primary impact with no block?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: And we don't want one without blocks.
It'll almost have to be blocky.
transcript.speaker: England
